name: Glass UX Studio
tagline: Dark gradient UX deck with glowing glass panels, app-flow cards, soft cyan UI elements, and product walkthrough layouts.

palette.description: deep blue gradient with translucent glass cards, cyan glow, and violet highlights

typography.style: sleek product sans with rounded digital body text

best_for: UX case studies, product walkthroughs, app concepts, and innovation pitches where the deck should feel like a digital product demo.
avoid_for: Traditional consulting, print-like brand editorial, or clinical education decks.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo User Experience Studio
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS interpretation based on public visual reference; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
